name: teamcity-mcp-agent-skills
description: Canonical TeamCity MCP workflows for AI agents.

workflows.title: Use TeamCity MCP
workflows.description: Install, connect, authenticate, discover, and safely use the TeamCity MCP server.

workflows.title: Create Build Configuration
workflows.description: Create or update a TeamCity build configuration for the current project.

workflows.title: Create Pipeline
workflows.description: Create TeamCity Pipelines or build chains for multi-stage CI flows.

workflows.title: First Green Build
workflows.description: Create or update TeamCity CI for a project and iterate until the first successful build.

workflows.title: Debug Failed Build
workflows.description: Diagnose and fix an existing failed TeamCity build.

adapters.description: Generic cross-agent instructions for user repositories.
